task_completion.description: The agent accessed the Splunk web interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Splunk Enterprise web interface is loaded in a web browser, typically showing the login screen, home screen, or Search & Reporting app.

task_completion.description: The agent executed a search query to aggregate web log data by client IP, calculating total requests and total bytes, filtered for > 200 requests.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Splunk Search bar contains a query with commands like 'stats count sum(bytes) by clientip' (or similar) and a filter like 'where count > 200'. Search results should reflect this aggregation.

task_completion.description: The agent created a report named 'Aggressive_Scraper_Report'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog, success message, or the Reports list showing a report explicitly named 'Aggressive_Scraper_Report'.

task_completion.description: The agent created a dashboard named 'Bot_Activity_Dashboard'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog, success message, or the Dashboards list showing a dashboard explicitly named 'Bot_Activity_Dashboard'.

task_completion.description: The 'Bot_Activity_Dashboard' contains at least two panels visualizing web traffic patterns or scraper activity.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Bot_Activity_Dashboard' is viewed or edited, displaying at least two distinct visualization panels (e.g., charts, graphs, or tables) showing web traffic data.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Splunk web GUI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser with the URL localhost:8000 and active interaction with Splunk UI elements (buttons, search bar, menus).

integrity.description: The agent used the actual Splunk Enterprise application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Standard Splunk UI components are visible, such as the black top navigation bar, the 'Search & Reporting' app interface, and Splunk-styled visualizations, rather than a text editor or mock interface.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the GUI by directly editing Splunk configuration files in the terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: The creation of reports and dashboards should be visible in the browser GUI, not through terminal commands editing .conf files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected report name is 'Aggressive_Scraper_Report'. The expected dashboard name is 'Bot_Activity_Dashboard'. The search query must filter for > 200 requests (or >= 201). Splunk credentials are admin / SplunkAdmin1!.
